details.note: Launched 4 lane-owners for Session Inspector: Runtime Event Persistence, Timeline UI, DuckDB Analytics, Debug Export + Flight Recorder

note.note: Lane 1 (Event Persistence) — 6 files: RuntimeEvent schema, EventStore service, event.sql.ts, event-bridge.ts, event-queries.ts, index.ts
Lane 2 (Timeline Inspector UI) — 7 files: inspector.tsx context, 6 TSX components
Lane 3 (DuckDB Analytics) — Updated schema.duckdb.ts with 6 analytical views, event-queries.ts with typed query functions
Lane 4 (Debug Packet + Flight Recorder) — 4 files: debug-packet.ts, debug-export.ts, flight-recorder.ts, index.ts
JSON Schema for RuntimeEvent (111 lines)
JSON Schema for DebugPacket (210 lines)
AW-003 Structured Scratchpad — Effect service with Ref-backed session state, 8 fields tracking agent reasoning, Layer composable
UX-001 Operating Picture — 453 lines, live MissionInfo derivation from event stream, 3 sub-components (MissionStatus, ClaimsMap, FileClaimsRow), reactive risk level algorithm
UX-002 Agent Diff Review — grouped by file/turn/claim/phase, revert per hunk, 'Explain this hunk' queries event ledger
UX-004 Command Palette — 14 commands across 6 categories, Cmd+K trigger, fuzzy search, context awareness, existing command infrastructure integration
UX-006 Why Did You Do That — Effect-based explainEvent(), parent/sibling/child tracing, in-memory cache, WhyButton + WhyPanel + IPC channel
UX-007 Error Recovery — 11 normalized error codes, failure hotspot grouping, 7 action buttons per error, 17 tests passing, ErrorCard + ErrorGroupCard + ErrorBadge
AW-005 Authority Contracts — 6 modes (investigate/patch/refactor/review/autopilot/rescue), glob-based read/write enforcement, stop conditions, tool pipeline gates, tagged errors
AW-004 Event History Queries — 9 registered tools (lastFailedTools, lastEditedFiles, lastPermissionDenials, lastCheckpoint, etc.), wired into tool registry, Effect service on EventStore
AW-002 Typed Tool Results — TypedToolResult<T> type, error classification (6 error classes), affordance resolution, wrapExecute() around all tools, tool registry integration
All 12 wave-2 lanes complete across Human Cockpit (7 lanes) and Agent Workbench (5 lanes). Total: 17 inspector components, 6 backend modules, 9 registered agent tools
CE-001 ContextInvalidationBus — 17 invalidation scopes, 18 pre-registered event types, PubSub-based Effect service, 3 files, 0 type errors
CE-004 Context Packet Assembly — L1/L2 packet, mission/authority/workspace/claims/validation/errors, freshness timestamps, graceful fallback on service failures

CE-006 DuckDB Context Projections — 5 tables (_ctx_file_events, _ctx_file_relevance, _ctx_file_cochange, _ctx_agent_heatmap, _ctx_error_files), buildContextProjections(), rankWorkingSet() with weighted scoring
SM-004 Secretary Controller — 474 lines, 10-state machine (idle→learning→planning→reviewing→executing→validating→repairing→completed), 7 methods, Event Schema tagged errors, pure reducer
SM-001 Core Domain — LaneState (15), CampaignState (12), TerminalStatus (9), RoleType (10), EvidenceRef, Transition, Role, Binder, Lane, Campaign — 24 exports, Effect Schema
SM-002 State Machine Spec — LANE_STATE_MACHINE (15 states, 16 transitions), CAMPAIGN_STATE_MACHINE (12 states), 20 PredicateSpec kinds, pure reduceCampaignState() reducer
SM-003 Transition Predicate Engine — 19 resolver functions (event_exists, latest_validation_passed, claims_acquired, etc.), priority-sorted transition checking, pure + Effect variants
SM-006 Binder — 447 lines, binder with 10 evidence sections, EventStore persistence, sha256 digest, 6 methods
SM-009 Campaign Integrator — 412 lines, topological sort, contract drift detection, 3 merge strategies, 4 tagged errors
SM-005 Role Contracts — 10 roles with allowed/forbidden tools, file scope validation, AuthorityContract mapping, LaneState tool derivation, 775 lines, 0 type errors
SM-007 Campaign Orchestrator — topological lane sorting, Secretary integration, campaign SM, push readiness checks
SM-008 Campaign Auditor — 483 lines, 10 audit checks (blocking/warning/info), CampaignLoader + AuditorService, 0 type errors
